prompt: Generate an information graphic map using the illustrative art style and diverse icons from image 1, integrating the choropleth data visualization technique with a legend from image 2 to color map areas based on data.
prompt_refined: Generate an information graphic map that combines the whimsical, illustrative art style and diverse iconography from image 1 (e.g., stylized trees, buildings, recreational elements) with a choropleth data visualization technique. The map should feature distinct, color-fillable regions that are colored based on data. Include a data legend in the bottom-left corner, styled like the 'Legend' section from image 2, using a purple color gradient to represent numerical data ranges for the choropleth coloring.
objects: Purple color gradient with numerical data ranges
